title: BoundingBox
description:
BoundingBox: An axis aligned cuboid, which describes the smallest volume Box, oriented with the global coordinate system, that fully encompases a set of geometry.
Defined by its two extreme corner Points, these six coordinate values of Min and Max X, Y and Z are combined to specify all eight Box corners.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
